data.content: Shipment complete. Feature branch worktree-fix-920b-vertical-align merged to main via fast-forward, rebased on latest remote main, and pushed as commit 36c1837aa497. All quality gates pass: typecheck clean, 2260/2260 tests pass, build succeeds. Changes: TableCell align-top→align-middle, profile/owner pills normalized to h-5, title column flex centered, 3 regression tests added.
